'''Deth Korakill''' was a mercantile [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]].

==Biography==
Korakill ventured into the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]] and was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the [[Yevethan Purge]] in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]. He owned a great green gemstone which became known as the [[Eye of Deth]] when it was taken by the [[Yevetha]].<ref name="CatCW" />
